column1: Dataset Title: Russian Arctic Vegetation Archive: Scheuchzerio-Caricetea Vegetation Plots
Dataset Author: Lavrinenko Olga, Matveyeva Nadezhda, Lavrinenko Igor

Dataset Reference: Lavrinenko O. V., Matveyeva N. V., Lavrinenko I. A. Communities of the class Scheuchzerio–Caricetea nigrae (Nordh. 1936) Tx. 1937 in the East European tundras // Vegetation of Russia. 2016. N 28. P. 55–88.
Dataset Table: Species Cover Data for Scheuchzerio-Caricetea Vegetation Plots

Dataset Notes: Species cover classes are the new Braun-Blanquet cover-abundance scale: r (single), + (less than 1 percent), 1 (1 to 5 percent), 2a (6 to 12 percent), 2b (13 to 25 percent), 3 (26 to 50 percent), 4 (51 to 75 percent), and 5 (76 to 100 percent). Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
